title.en: China-to-Austria Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入奥地利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入奧地利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Austria (ASI / E-Control / APG) expectations: ASI-adopted standards routes, E-Control and APG grid-connection processes, CE-marking-aligned requirements, IEC 62109, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence, with 230/400 V 50 Hz grid settings — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines. OVE electrotechnical rules and German-language documentation requirements apply. Austria is landlocked; sea freight via Hamburg, Koper, or Trieste.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与奥地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）要求的对照，包括ASI采用路径、E-Control/APG并网审查、EU CE一致性证据、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤岛和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据；并考虑230/400 V、50 Hz电网，与中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准比较。OVE电工技术规则及德语文件要求并行适用。奥地利为内陆国，海运经汉堡、科佩尔或的里雅斯特。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與奧地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）要求的對照，包括ASI採用路徑、E-Control/APG併網審查、EU CE一致性證據、IEC 62109、IEC 62116、防孤島和IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據；並考慮230/400 V、50 Hz電網，與中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準比較。OVE電工技術規則及德語文件要求並行適用。奧地利為內陸國，海運經漢堡、科佩爾或的里雅斯特。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, standards determination, grid-operator approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Austria (ASI / E-Control / APG) requirements and OVE electrotechnical rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、标准裁定、并网审批、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行奥地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）及OVE电工技术规则要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、標準裁定、併網核准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行奧地利（ASI / E-Control / APG）及OVE電工技術規則要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Austria, practical gaps are: confirm the applicable ASI route and project-level approval path via E-Control / APG; validate that IEC 62109-1/-2 safety testing, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC documentation are accepted for Austrian installations; and prove 230/400 V 50 Hz performance, protection thresholds, and reconnection timing for APG-connected projects. OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules apply alongside EU directives, and German-language documentation is commonly required. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 documents are useful but not automatically interchangeable with Austrian evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口奥地利时，主要差距包括：确认ASI适用路径与经E-Control/APG的项目级审批，核实IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC证据是否被奥地利项目接受，并验证APG并网项目在230/400 V 50 Hz下的保护阈值与重连延迟。OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则与欧盟指令并行适用，通常须提供德语文件。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004与GB/T 19964证据不能自动替代奥地利证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口奧地利時，主要差距包括：確認ASI適用路徑與經E-Control/APG的項目級審核，核實IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727並網介面和IEC 62920/IEC 61000 EMC證據是否被奧地利項目接受，並驗證APG併網項目在230/400 V 50 Hz下的保護閾值與重連延遲。OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則與歐盟指令並行適用，通常須提供德語文件。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004與GB/T 19964證據不能自動替代奧地利證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
